title: Rowecvce 4 Pack Candy Fluffy Butter Slime Kit, Scented Putty Slimes for Kids, Soft and No-Sticky, Party Favors, Stress Relief Toys for Boys Girls
features: 🍫Fun Candy Slime Kit:4 pack butter slimes(pink, blue, white, purple), 4 realistic candy accessories, 1 pack of foam, 1 pack of candy chips, 1 candy packaging box
🍩Foam Slime:The slime comes with foam balls, which adds a different sensory experience and is very interesting

🍰DIY Slime:High-quality butter slime is one of the choices of early education products. The beautiful colors enrich children's imagination, and the strong stretchability and plasticity improve children's hands-on ability
🍧Ideal Gift:The cute butter slime kit is a gift that both boys and girls like, and can be used as a gift for birthdays, Easter, Christmas, Valentine's Day

🍭Warm Tip:The slime can be reused, please put it back into the container when not in use, in case it is exposed to the air for a long time to dry out. Reminder: Children under the age of 3 must be accompanied by an adult to play
description: From the brand Previous page ROWECVCE, Our journey began with a simple idea: to create toys that inspire creativity, sensory exploration. From vibrant colors to mesmerizing textures, our slimes and putties are more than just toys—they’re tools for self-expression and stress relief. Whether it’s stretching, squishing, or shaping, our toys bring joy and relaxation to every moment. Join us in shaping a world where imagination knows no bounds!
